#define ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS (2500LL * 5000LL * 5000LL)

Functions

#define ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS (2500LL * 5000LL * 5000LL)

Function Documentation

int main (int argc, char * argv[])

Definition at line 25 of file strings/main.c.

25                                  {
26   long long count = 1;
27   int dump_adjectives = 0;
28   int dump_nouns = 0;
29 
30   static struct option long_options[] = {
31     {"count", required_argument, 0, 'n'},
32     {"dump-adjectives", no_argument, 0, 'a'},
33     {"dump-nouns", no_argument, 0, 'o'},
34     {"help", no_argument, 0, 'h'},
35     {0, 0, 0, 0}
36   };
37 
38   int opt;
39   while ((opt = getopt_long(argc, argv, "n:aoh", long_options, NULL)) != -1) {
40     switch (opt) {
41       case 'n':
42         count = strtoll(optarg, NULL, 10);
43         break;
44       case 'a':
45         dump_adjectives = 1;
46         break;
47       case 'o':
48         dump_nouns = 1;
49         break;
50       case 'h':
51         printf("Usage: ascii-chat-strings [OPTIONS]\n");
52         printf("Generate memorable session strings (adjective-noun-noun format)\n");
53         printf("\nOptions:\n");
54         printf("  -n, --count COUNT        Generate COUNT session strings (default: 1)\n");
55         printf("  -a, --dump-adjectives    Dump adjectives list as JavaScript\n");
56         printf("  -o, --dump-nouns         Dump nouns list as JavaScript\n");
57         printf("  -h, --help               Show this help message\n");
58         return 0;
59       default:
60         return ERROR_USAGE;
61     }
62   }
63 
64   // Handle dump modes
65   if (dump_adjectives) {
66     printf("export const adjectives = [\n");
67     for (size_t i = 0; i < adjectives_count; i++) {
68       printf("  \"%s\"%s\n", adjectives[i], (i < adjectives_count - 1) ? "," : "");
69     }
70     printf("];\n");
71     printf("export const adjectives_count = %zu;\n", adjectives_count);
72     return 0;
73   }
74 
75   if (dump_nouns) {
76     printf("export const nouns = [\n");
77     for (size_t i = 0; i < nouns_count; i++) {
78       printf("  \"%s\"%s\n", nouns[i], (i < nouns_count - 1) ? "," : "");
79     }
80     printf("];\n");
81     printf("export const nouns_count = %zu;\n", nouns_count);
82     return 0;
83   }
84 
85   // Normal session string generation
86   if (count <= 0 || (long long)count > ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS) {
87     return ERROR_USAGE;
88   }
89 
90   // Generate session strings
91   for (long long i = 0; i < count; i++) {
92     uint32_t adj_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)adjectives_count);
93     uint32_t noun1_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)nouns_count);
94     uint32_t noun2_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)nouns_count);
95 
96     printf("%s-%s-%s\n",
97            adjectives[adj_idx],
98            nouns[noun1_idx],
99            nouns[noun2_idx]);
100   }
101 
102   return 0;
103 }




References ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS, adjectives,
    adjectives_count, nouns, and nouns_count.
